description: Management Cluster health dashboard. Select an MC from the cluster dropdown to view HCP counts, SLA, HyperShift component health, node health, Karpenter provisioning, and Kubernetes workload health for that MC.

panels.description: Total Hosted Control Planes running on this Management Cluster.
panels.title: Total HCPs

panels.description: HCPs on this MC currently reporting as available (KubeAPIServerAvailable = True).
panels.title: HCPs Available

panels.description: HCPs on this MC reporting as unavailable, excluding clusters that are installing or being deleted.

targets.expr: count(hcp:hostedcluster_available{cluster=~"$cluster"} == 0 unless on(namespace) hcp:lifecycle_installing{cluster=~"$cluster"} unless on(namespace) hcp:lifecycle_deleting{cluster=~"$cluster"}) or vector(0)

panels.title: HCPs Unavailable

panels.description: HCPs on this MC currently waiting for initial availability.
panels.title: HCPs Installing

panels.description: HCPs on this MC currently being deleted.
panels.title: HCPs Deleting

panels.description: Median 30-day availability across HCPs on this MC. The SLA target is 99.95%.
panels.title: Median HCP Availability (30d)

panels.description: Median error budget remaining across HCPs on this MC. 100% means no availability loss; 0% means the 99.95% SLA budget is fully consumed over 30 days.
panels.title: Median Error Budget Remaining

panels.description: Number of HCPs on this MC whose 30-day availability is below the 99.95% SLA target.
panels.title: HCPs Below SLA Target

panels.description: 30-day availability for each HCP on this MC. Outliers indicate problem clusters on this specific MC.
panels.title: HCP Availability Distribution (30d)

panels.description: Median error budget remaining over time for HCPs on this MC. A downward trend indicates availability degradation consuming the error budget.
panels.title: Median Error Budget Burn Rate

panels.description: Number of pods in Running phase across MC platform namespaces (HyperShift, kube-applier, cert-manager, etc.).
panels.title: Pods Running

panels.description: Pods in MC platform namespaces that are not in a Ready state.
panels.title: Pods Not Ready

panels.description: Total container restarts across MC platform namespaces in the last hour.
panels.title: Container Restarts

panels.description: Container restart rate per MC platform namespace. Helps identify which service is restarting.
panels.title: Pod Restarts by Namespace

panels.description: Count of not-ready pods per MC platform namespace over time.
panels.title: Pods Not Ready by Namespace

panels.description: Number of nodes in Ready condition on this MC.
panels.title: Nodes Ready

panels.description: Nodes not in Ready condition on this MC.
panels.title: Nodes Not Ready

panels.description: CPU utilization of the busiest node on this MC.
panels.title: Max Node CPU Utilization

panels.description: Memory utilization of the busiest node on this MC.
panels.title: Max Node Memory Utilization

panels.description: Nodes on this MC with DiskPressure condition.
panels.title: Disk Pressure

panels.description: Node pressure conditions over time on this MC.
panels.title: Node Conditions

panels.description: CPU utilization per node on this MC.
panels.title: CPU Usage by Node

panels.description: Memory utilization per node on this MC.
panels.title: Memory Usage by Node

panels.description: Nodes provisioned by Karpenter on this MC in the selected range.
panels.title: Nodes Created

panels.description: Nodes terminated by Karpenter on this MC in the given range.
panels.title: Nodes Terminated

panels.description: Current CPU usage as a percentage of the NodePool CPU limit on this MC.
panels.title: NodePool CPU Utilization

panels.description: Current memory usage as a percentage of the NodePool memory limit on this MC.
panels.title: NodePool Memory Utilization

panels.description: Rate of node creation vs termination by Karpenter on this MC. Persistent high rates of both indicate instability.
panels.title: Node Churn

panels.description: NodeClaims on this MC that are not yet fulfilled.
panels.title: Pending NodeClaims

panels.description: Karpenter voluntary disruption decisions on this MC — consolidation, drift, expiration.
panels.title: Disruption Actions

panels.description: Percentage of API server requests returning 5xx errors on this MC.
panels.title: API Server Error Rate

panels.description: Pods in Pending phase across all namespaces on this MC.
panels.title: Pending Pods

panels.description: Kubernetes jobs currently in a failed state on this MC.
panels.title: Failed Jobs

panels.description: Containers whose last termination was due to OOM on this MC.
panels.title: OOMKilled Containers

panels.description: Total API server request rate on this MC.
panels.title: API Server Request Rate

panels.description: 99th percentile API server request latency on this MC.
panels.title: API Server Latency (p99)

panels.description: Container restart rate across all namespaces on this MC.
panels.title: Container Restarts by Namespace

panels.description: Number of pending pods on this MC over time.
panels.title: Pending Pods Over Time

title: MC Health
